title: 雙子座巴絲入嚟吹吓水(5)

replies.msg:
見到風座星座post好多雙子巴絲所以開番個雙子post
雙子座嘅你/鍾意雙子座嘅你/另一半係雙子嘅你 歡迎分享
有咩事想問嘅，留多啲details方便大家覆你


建議大家再自己Google吓自己個48星座
－－－－－

香港人 加油

爆咗post我可以安心去訓了

睇太陽同月亮都夠

啲人話上昇都重要 但都係唔係好理解
覆post就像龍捲風
原來今日個post只係開咗6個鐘就爆

我同我女友都是雙子座 ♊️My friend Jess is a Gemini ♊️ while her boyfriend is a Aquarius ♒️ Just the other day her boyfriend got into a scuffle with a guy who was hitting on Jess. The police showed up later and jealousy was assigned as the motive for the scuffle. Her brother sometimes has a snooze at lunchtime because he has so much work to do that he feels drained. He likes to nap on the sofa 🛋 or at his desk by the fireplace when everybody else is having lunch outside. He once brought his work along to the library where I saw him doze off at the table. Taking a nap especially by the fire is a marvelous way to recharge your energy though. Her sister has just completed a PhD at Tokyo university and is on the way to becoming a professor. Japan is on the way to becoming the world’s strongest economy.
